condition_cn: 条件：90分钟常规时间打平；输入包括完整90分钟预测、平局比分分布、淘汰赛证据、常规时间Tail与MAS结论。

points.rationale_cn: 最高路径。该分支已以90分钟打平为条件，常见起点是1-1、2-2和0-0；其中1-1与0-0占比很高，天然支持加时低增量。摩洛哥紧凑中低位、淘汰赛风险厌恶和布努点球履历提高其接受拖入点球的策略价值；荷兰虽有控球推进优势，但在30分钟短样本内未必能把外围压制转化为高质量进球。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 0-0: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: 第二主线，指荷兰加时净增一球。德容、赫拉芬贝赫、赖因德斯带来的中场推进、二点回收和后段跑动深度，使荷兰在加时仍更可能持续制造阵地压迫。若90分钟起点为0-0或1-1，且摩洛哥后腰横移和禁区弧顶保护下降，荷兰小胜破局最合理。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 1-0: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: 摩洛哥加时小胜的活跃尾部。若荷兰为避免点球而提高边后卫和中场站位，身后空间会放大；摩洛哥可通过哈基米、布拉欣或右肋快速出球完成转换偷袭。该路径在90分钟2-2或更高比分平局起点下升权，但整体仍低于荷兰1-0。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 0-1: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时双方各进一球后仍平，进入点球。该路径主要来自90分钟已较开放的2-2或3-3以上起点，也可能由体能下降导致压迫质量和回防间距同时变差。荷兰持续推进与摩洛哥反击互换机会，但不是低增量主线。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 1-1: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 荷兰多球加时胜的最主要Other尾部。通常需要荷兰在加时前15分钟先破局，迫使摩洛哥前压，再利用身后空间、二点球或转换追加第二球。因需要早段进球触发，概率明显低于1-0。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 2-0: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 摩洛哥两球加时胜尾部。触发条件通常是摩洛哥先通过右路转换得手，随后荷兰全面压上，反而再次暴露身后空间。该路径有哈基米和布拉欣转换机制支撑，但需要连续高效率反击兑现，因此低于0-1。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 0-2: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球，体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score, Fatigue collapse / extra-time breakthrough
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 2-1: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球，体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score, Fatigue collapse / extra-time breakthrough
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 1-2: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 双方加时互有进球但仍未分胜负的补充覆盖路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 2-2: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 3-0: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 0-3: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 3-1: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 1-3: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 3-2: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: Rationale for 2-3: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

tail_focus.label: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时30分钟内通过反击、定位球或替补冲击形成1球胜负。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 第二主线，指荷兰加时净增一球。德容、赫拉芬贝赫、赖因德斯带来的中场推进、二点回收和后段跑动深度，使荷兰在加时仍更可能持续制造阵地压迫。若90分钟起点为0-0或1-1，且摩洛哥后腰横移和禁区弧顶保护下降，荷兰小胜破局最合理。
tail_focus.definition_en: A one-goal decision in extra time through a counterattack, set piece, or substitute impact.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Rationale for 1-0: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

tail_focus.label: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时阶段双方均有进球，比赛从谨慎拖入开放对攻。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 加时双方各进一球后仍平，进入点球。该路径主要来自90分钟已较开放的2-2或3-3以上起点，也可能由体能下降导致压迫质量和回防间距同时变差。荷兰持续推进与摩洛哥反击互换机会，但不是低增量主线。
tail_focus.label_en: Open extra time / both teams score
tail_focus.definition_en: Both teams score in extra time as a cautious game turns into a more open exchange.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Rationale for 1-1: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

tail_focus.label: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.label_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时净胜至少2球，或总进球达到3球以上的一方打穿路径。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 荷兰多球加时胜的最主要Other尾部。通常需要荷兰在加时前15分钟先破局，迫使摩洛哥前压，再利用身后空间、二点球或转换追加第二球。因需要早段进球触发，概率明显低于1-0。
tail_focus.definition_en: An extra-time breakthrough where one side wins by at least two goals or the phase reaches three or more goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Rationale for 2-0: conditional on reaching extra time, this path reflects fatigue, bench impact, set pieces and risk preference. It should be read as an extra-time conditional path.

key_factors.impact_cn: 90分钟后Netherlands与Morocco的跑动衰减、防线回收和二点保护决定加时是否被打开。
key_factors.impact_en: After 90 minutes, the running drop-off, defensive recovery and second-ball protection of the Netherlands and Morocco determine whether extra time opens up.
key_factors.text_cn: 90分钟后Netherlands与Morocco的跑动衰减、防线回收和二点保护决定加时是否被打开。
key_factors.text_en: After 90 minutes, the running drop-off, defensive recovery and second-ball protection of the Netherlands and Morocco determine whether extra time opens up.

key_factors.impact_cn: 边路、前锋和中场替补能否带来速度与对抗优势，是加时一球决胜的核心变量。
key_factors.impact_en: Whether wide, forward and midfield substitutes can add speed and dueling advantages is a core variable for a one-goal extra-time decision.
key_factors.text_cn: 边路、前锋和中场替补能否带来速度与对抗优势，是加时一球决胜的核心变量。
key_factors.text_en: Whether wide, forward and midfield substitutes can add speed and dueling advantages is a core variable for a one-goal extra-time decision.

key_factors.impact_cn: 教练是主动在加时解决比赛，还是降低风险拖入点球，会直接改变加时增量矩阵。
key_factors.impact_en: Whether the coach tries to settle the match in extra time or lowers risk to reach penalties directly changes the extra-time increment matrix.
key_factors.text_cn: 教练是主动在加时解决比赛，还是降低风险拖入点球，会直接改变加时增量矩阵。
key_factors.text_en: Whether the coach tries to settle the match in extra time or lowers risk to reach penalties directly changes the extra-time increment matrix.

key_factors.impact_cn: 体能下降后运动战质量下降，角球、任意球和禁区二点球权重上升。
key_factors.impact_en: As fatigue reduces open-play quality, corners, free kicks and box second balls gain weight.
key_factors.text_cn: 体能下降后运动战质量下降，角球、任意球和禁区二点球权重上升。
key_factors.text_en: As fatigue reduces open-play quality, corners, free kicks and box second balls gain weight.

key_factors.impact_cn: 黄牌、红牌和犯规风险会改变防守动作尺度，增加加时突然失衡概率。
key_factors.impact_en: Yellow cards, red cards and foul risk change defensive behavior and increase the probability of a sudden extra-time imbalance.
key_factors.text_cn: 黄牌、红牌和犯规风险会改变防守动作尺度，增加加时突然失衡概率。
key_factors.text_en: Yellow cards, red cards and foul risk change defensive behavior and increase the probability of a sudden extra-time imbalance.

key_factors.impact_cn: 若一方相信点球优势，加时后段可能更保守；若点球劣势明显，则可能提前提速。
key_factors.impact_en: If one side believes it has a shootout edge, it may become more conservative late in extra time; if it sees a shootout disadvantage, it may speed up earlier.
key_factors.text_cn: 若一方相信点球优势，加时后段可能更保守；若点球劣势明显，则可能提前提速。
key_factors.text_en: If one side believes it has a shootout edge, it may become more conservative late in extra time; if it sees a shootout disadvantage, it may speed up earlier.

condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes; inputs include the full 90-minute prediction, draw-score distribution, knockout evidence, normal-time tail scenarios and MAS conclusions.
